description: Silver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortBlack leather strap with a tang claspBlack coloured dial with silver coloured hands Brand logo in between the 8 and 9 hour mark Three chronographic displaysScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when washing hands Warranty: 2 years
